creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
Created attachment 210943
maintainer update to devel/godot2

Update devel/godot2 to v2.1.6
Include use of system libvpx for non-x86 systems
This matches changes made to devel/godot from bug #241762

I don't recall where I got the addition of CXXFLAGS_${ARCH}= -DNO_THREADS
